reviews.comment:
Cuando viajo desde Villa Regina a Bahía Blanca, es un placer detenerme aquí, combustible, nunca falta, un excelente café y parai aseo, impecable todo, además la atención es excelente, recomendable!!!

(Translated by Google)
When I travel from Villa Regina to Bahía Blanca, it's a pleasure to stop here. They always have fuel, excellent coffee, and the restroom is spotless. Plus, the service is excellent. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTZ0lMVWZnEAE
